pull.title: [4/N][Attention] Move MLA common to model_executor
pull.body:
## Purpose
Step 4 of #31919. Moves `vllm/v1/attention/backends/mla/common.py` to `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` and updates imports accordingly.

## Test Plan
CI

## Test Result

---
<details>
<summary> Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist </summary>

- [x] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)".
- [x] The test plan, such as providing test command.
- [ ] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results
- [ ] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model.
- [ ] (Optional) Release notes update. If your change is user facing, please update the release notes draft in the [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YyVqrgX4gHTtrstbq8oWUImOyPCKSGnJ7xtTpmXzlRs/edit?tab=t.0).
</details>

---

> [!NOTE]
> <sup>[Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) is generating a summary for commit 86bf729e00a9e8ab17cd792981816017d8dbcddf. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>

---

> [!NOTE]
> Centralizes MLA shared logic under `model_executor` and fixes references across the codebase.
> 
> - Adds `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` consolidating `MLACommon*`, `QueryLenSupport`, and helpers
> - Updates MLA backends (`cutlass_mla`, `flashattn_mla`, `flashmla`, `flashinfer_mla`, `triton_mla`, `rocm_aiter_mla[_sparse]`, `flashmla_sparse`) to import from the new path
> - Adjusts distributed KV connectors (example and p2p NCCL) and spec decode (`eagle.py`) to use `MLACommonMetadata` from the new module
> - Aligns tests to new imports and minor logging formatter docstring cleanup
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit 86bf729e00a9e8ab17cd792981816017d8dbcddf. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>

---

> [!NOTE]
> Centralizes MLA shared logic under `model_executor` and aligns references project-wide.
> 
> - Adds `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` consolidating `MLACommon*`, `QueryLenSupport`, and helpers
> - Updates MLA backends (`cutlass_mla`, `flashattn_mla`, `flashmla`, `flashinfer_mla`, `triton_mla`, `rocm_aiter_mla[_sparse]`, `flashmla_sparse`) to import from the new module
> - Adjusts distributed KV connectors (example and NCCL p2p) and spec decode (`eagle.py`) to use `MLACommonMetadata` from the new path
> - Fixes tests to the new imports; minor logging formatter docstring cleanup
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit c16dab812e8464fa403fa391d80ee4a900d8539a. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>

---

> [!NOTE]
> Centralizes MLA shared logic under `model_executor`, aligning imports project-wide.
> 
> - Adds `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` consolidating `MLACommon*`, `QueryLenSupport`, and helpers
> - Updates MLA backends (`cutlass_mla`, `flashattn_mla`, `flashmla`, `flashinfer_mla`, `triton_mla`, `rocm_aiter_mla[_sparse]`, `flashmla_sparse`) to import from the new module
> - Adjusts distributed KV connectors (example and NCCL p2p) and spec decode (`v1/spec_decode/eagle.py`) to use `MLACommonMetadata` from the new path
> - Updates tests to new imports; minor logging formatter docstring cleanup
> 
> No functional behavior changes intended beyond path refactors.
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit c2dbe7904c87902a410ac496dc0e22fc39dab0f6. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>

---

> [!NOTE]
> Centralizes MLA shared logic under `model_executor`, with project-wide import updates.
> 
> - Adds `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` consolidating `MLACommon*`, `QueryLenSupport`, `get_mla_dims`, and helpers
> - Updates MLA backends (`cutlass_mla`, `flashattn_mla`, `flashmla`, `flashinfer_mla`, `triton_mla`, `rocm_aiter_mla[_sparse]`, `flashmla_sparse`) to import from the new module
> - Adjusts distributed KV connectors (example, NCCL p2p) and spec decode (`v1/spec_decode/eagle.py`) to use `MLACommonMetadata` from the new path
> - Aligns tests to new imports; minor docstring cleanup in logging formatter
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit 69398053da77b78c6a840851a0e1aa3f1e211195. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>

---

> [!NOTE]
> Centralizes MLA shared logic under `model_executor` with project-wide import updates.
> 
> - Adds `vllm/model_executor/layers/attention/mla_attention.py` consolidating `MLACommon*`, `QueryLenSupport`, and helpers (e.g., `get_mla_dims`)
> - Updates MLA backends (`cutlass_mla`, `flashattn_mla`, `flashmla`, `flashinfer_mla`, `triton_mla`, `rocm_aiter_mla[_sparse]`, `flashmla_sparse`) to import from the new module
> - Aligns distributed KV connectors (example, NCCL p2p) and spec decode (`v1/spec_decode/eagle.py`) to use `MLACommonMetadata` from the new path
> - Adjusts tests to new imports; minor logging formatter docstring cleanup
> 
> <sup>Written by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot) for commit 67d60a0e06274bc72da91e4123a81986cfe67373. This will update automatically on new commits. Configure [here](https://cursor.com/dashboard?tab=bugbot).</sup>
